description: Profit and loss model for ACME Corp — budget vs actuals by cost centre and fiscal period

columns.name: actual_revenue
columns.description: Actual revenue recognised in the period

columns.name: gross_margin
columns.description: Gross margin (actual revenue minus actual COGS)

columns.name: cost_centre_name
columns.description: Name of the cost centre responsible for the P&L row

columns.name: cost_centre_type
columns.description: Type of cost centre (revenue / overhead / capex)

columns.name: fiscal_period_start
columns.description: Start date of the fiscal period

columns.name: fiscal_period_end
columns.description: End date of the fiscal period

column_groups.name: CostCentreTree
column_groups.description: Corporate → division → department → cost centre hierarchy
